SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.spi

Interface EntityCacheMetricsMXBean

All Known Implementing Classes:
EntityCacheMetrics
public interface EntityCacheMetricsMXBean
JMX MXBean interface for entity cache metrics.

Register under st.orm:type=EntityCacheMetrics. Exposes read-only counters and a reset() operation to clear all accumulated data.

These metrics aggregate across all transaction-scoped entity caches.

Since:
1.9

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    getClears()
    Number of full cache clears.
    long
    getEvictions()
    Number of cache entries cleaned up after garbage collection.
    long
    getGetHitRatioPercent()
    Get hit ratio as a percentage (0-100).
    long
    getGetHits()
    Number of get() calls that returned a cached entity.
    long
    getGetMisses()
    Number of get() calls where no cached entity was available.
    long
    getGets()
    Total number of get() calls.
    long
    getInternHitRatioPercent()
    Intern hit ratio as a percentage (0-100).
    long
    getInternHits()
    Number of intern() calls that reused an existing canonical instance.
    long
    getInternMisses()
    Number of intern() calls that stored a new or updated instance (no reusable entry found).
    long
    getInterns()
    Total number of intern() calls.
    long
    getRemovals()
    Number of cache entries removed due to entity mutations (insert, update, delete).
    Map<String,String>
    getRetentionPerEntity()
    Returns the effective CacheRetention per entity type.
    void
    reset()
    Resets all counters to zero.

  • Method Details

    • getGets

      long getGets()
      Total number of get() calls.

    • getGetHits

      long getGetHits()
      Number of get() calls that returned a cached entity.

    • getGetMisses

      long getGetMisses()
      Number of get() calls where no cached entity was available.

    • getGetHitRatioPercent

      long getGetHitRatioPercent()
      Get hit ratio as a percentage (0-100).

    • getInterns

      long getInterns()
      Total number of intern() calls.

    • getInternHits

      long getInternHits()
      Number of intern() calls that reused an existing canonical instance.

    • getInternMisses

      long getInternMisses()
      Number of intern() calls that stored a new or updated instance (no reusable entry found).

    • getInternHitRatioPercent

      long getInternHitRatioPercent()
      Intern hit ratio as a percentage (0-100).

    • getRemovals

      long getRemovals()
      Number of cache entries removed due to entity mutations (insert, update, delete).

    • getClears

      long getClears()
      Number of full cache clears.

    • getEvictions

      long getEvictions()
      Number of cache entries cleaned up after garbage collection.

    • getRetentionPerEntity

      Map<String,String> getRetentionPerEntity()
      Returns the effective CacheRetention per entity type.

      Each key is the simple class name of the entity type, and the value is the retention mode name (e.g., "DEFAULT", "LIGHT").

    • reset

      void reset()
      Resets all counters to zero.
